Hello 11ty!
About

Hello 11ty!

Oh hi! Welcome to the Fastly Eleventy starter, where you can create a blog and publish it to the edge using your very own serverless Compute app.

Remix this project and open it in a GitHub Codespace or your favourite IDE – follow the steps in the README to deploy your new blog to Fastly Compute in a few steps!
